title: Resource Browser: Snippets
text: Resource Browser: Snippets Insert, copy or paste code snippets from Snippet Libraries into your script or layout. Uniface provides the default libraries for HTML and ProcScript: UHTML_COMMON—HTML snippets for server page layouts USCRIPT_COMMON—common Script snippets USCRIPT_API—trigger snippets for application shells USCRIPT_ CPT —trigger snippets for specific component types Note: USYSLIBSNP is the template for snippet libraries. How to To select a snippet library, click libsnp in the U-Bar of the Resource Browser, and select the library you want to use. To insert a snippet, select a snippet and right-click in either the Resource Browser or the code editor and use the menu to insert or copy and paste snippets in the desired location. If you select and copy multiple snippets, their content is pasted with a line feed separating the different snippets. Find and Insert Snippets Related Links Snippets Snippets are named fragments of code or text that you can insert into your application script or layout to speed development. They are defined as development objects in snippet libraries. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
